caption:
Public Wi-Fi should not feel like Russian roulette.

I was in a cafe, everything kept buffering, and random networks felt sketchy.
Then I switched one thing: Freedom DNS.

One tap and my internet felt faster, cleaner, and way more private.
No complicated setup. No drama.

If you use public Wi-Fi a lot, this is a no-brainer.

#privacy #dns #mobileinternet #cyberhygiene #internetsafety
title: Freedom DNS - Cafe Wi-Fi Fix
